name: Marcus Webb
text: Izzy was the best DM I ever played with. They built entire worlds from scratch â maps, lore, NPCs with actual backstories. Our Tuesday night campaigns were the thing I looked forward to every week. They always found a way to surprise us, even when we thought we had the plot figured out.

name: Priya Sharma
text: Working on Interfectorem with Izzy was one of the highlights of my teenage years. They were the creative engine of our whole team â always sketching characters in the margins of their notebook, always pushing us to make the story darker and weirder. When we won at Demo Day, Izzy just looked at all of us and said "obviously." Classic.
